programmes.show_description: Katie Breathwick has the perfect blend of night-time music to keep you company through the early hours.
Sam presents three hours of start-the-day music, along with plenty of information about what's in store on Classic FM this weekend.
Tim presents Classic FM Breakfast at the weekend, with the Classic FM Hall of Fame countdown starting at 9am.
This Easter, Classic FM counts down the world's biggest classical music chart: The Classic FM Hall of Fame.
This Easter weekend, Classic FM counts down the world's biggest classical music chart: The Classic FM Hall of Fame.

Across the Easter weekend, we continue to count down the world's biggest classical music chart: The Classic FM Hall of Fame.
Comedian Tom Allen presents some of the most extraordinary stories behind classical music, from larger-than-life legends to downright divas.
Myleene presents her selection of calming classical music to help you wind down at the end of the day.
